query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: Two translucent Sony HF 90 cassette tapes, labeled "Rock" and "Jazz," lie on a white surface alongside three instant photographs with white borders. One photograph depicts a white dog seated on a dark patterned rug near a pile of light fabric. Another shows a person in a red shirt reclining on a carpeted floor. The third shows a person in a pink shirt and shorts kneeling beside a large pink cushion with one arm raised.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two translucent Sony HF 90 cassette tapes labeled "Rock" and "Jazz" lie on a white surface alongside three instant photographs exhibiting amateur snapshot energy and harsh direct flash illumination. One photograph shows a white dog on a dark patterned rug with bright highlights from the flash. Another shows a person in a red shirt reclining on carpet. The third shows a person in pink clothing kneeling beside a large cushion, with the subject's raised arm cut off by the upper edge of the frame.
